meta.title: Consent Policy
meta.description: How NavDhan obtains and manages your consent.

company.name: NavDhan
company.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

intro.heading: Consent Policy
intro.body: Consent is at the heart of how NavDhan operates. This policy explains how we obtain, use, and honour your consent when you use our services.

sections.title: বাংলা
sections.body: বাংলা অনুবাদ শীঘ্রই আসছে। এই ফাইলটি বাংলা স্থানীয়করণের জন্য একটি প্লেসহোল্ডার।

sections.title: Consent-first approach
sections.body: We collect only the data we need, ask before we share it, and give you meaningful choices. Consent is always free, informed, specific, and revocable.

items.heading: Identity verification
items.body: Consent to verify your identity using PAN, Aadhaar OTP, or other KYC documents.

items.heading: Business verification
items.body: Consent to fetch GST returns, bank statements, and business records.

items.heading: Lender sharing
items.body: Consent to share your application with selected lender partners.

items.heading: Communication
items.body: Consent to receive calls, emails, and messages related to your application.

items.heading: Clear language
items.body: Each consent request tells you what data is collected and why.

items.heading: Active action
items.body: You must take an affirmative action, such as checking a box or tapping "I agree".

items.heading: Granular choice
items.body: Where possible, you can choose which purposes and data sharing you accept.

items.heading: How to withdraw
items.body: Email support@kubar.tech or use controls in your account where available.

items.heading: Effect of withdrawal
items.body: Withdrawing optional consent may limit certain features but will not affect offers already sanctioned.

items.heading: Retention
items.body: We may retain some data where required by law after you withdraw consent.

items.heading: Lender partners
items.body: Only the lender(s) you select or agree to evaluate your application.

items.heading: Verification providers
items.body: Credit bureaus, account aggregators, and analytics providers with your consent.

items.heading: Regulators
items.body: Government or regulatory bodies when required by law.

contact.name: NavDhan Support
contact.address: 156, Tarvakere, BTM Layout 1st Stage, Bengaluru, Karnataka

sections.title: Privacy Policy
sections.body: For further details on data handling, please read our Privacy Policy.

localeNote: বাংলা অনুবাদ শীঘ্রই আসছে। এই ফাইলটি বাংলা স্থানীয়করণের জন্য একটি প্লেসহোল্ডার।
